---
title: "Output Algorithm Results"
author: "Raymond Nelson"
date: "7/13/2019"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
---


## Bootstrap algorithm (Honts & Devitt, 1992)



```{r}
get("DX0I6GD_X_bootstrapOutputList", envir=.GlobalEnv)

# DX0I6GD_X_bootstrapOutputList$bootstrapQuestionResults

 
```
